gpt55_review_summary: APPROVED by GPT-5.5 subagent. No blocking findings in cache.py or test_cache.py; validation/normalization is consistent with existing cache helper rules and internal producers still emit valid values.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_cache.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q (88 passed)
poetry run python console script import validation (validated 50 console scripts)
what_changed: Added __post_init__ validation to ChunkCacheStats and ChunkCacheResult so public cache telemetry rejects negative/non-integer counters, normalizes bytes-like payloads to immutable bytes, and validates cache tiers.
why: Serving diagnostics and materialization code rely on these public artifacts to report cache tiers and counters; validating them at construction keeps bad telemetry from propagating silently.
